meaning: n.露齿笑,裂口笑v.露齿而笑
examples: Mary gave her a sheepish grin.
He always had this inane grin.
An enormous grin spread across his face.
The song that emerged championed working stiffs who have to grin and bear abuse from customers.
"We're having an amazing day so far, " she said with a grin, glancing at the register.
